name: Li Bai

skills.name: Way of the Sword
skills.description: Basic Attack hits grant stacks. At 4 stacks, increases Physical Attack and unlocks the Ultimate.

skills.name: Stupor Slash
skills.description: Dashes and leaves an after image at the start point while stunning and damaging enemies in his path.Can dash again before cooldown starts, and a third time to return to the after image.

skills.name: Stroke of Genius
skills.description: Removes crowd control effects from self and becomes untargetable. Damages enemies in range, leaving behind a sword formation. Enemies that touch the edge of the formation are damaged, slowed, andsundered.

skills.name: Flickering Flurry
skills.description: Transforms into a phantom, continuously slashing at the specified area. Li Bai is untargetable while the skill is active, and all debuffs are removed Deals AoE damage, but damage is diminished upon hitting multiple enemy heroes.

tips: Li Bai is a Medium Assassin (Jungling) on Honor of Kings Global. Camp HOK ranks them Tier A with 52.0% win rate and 0.7% pick rate as of 2026-06-05.
Best build path: Rapacious Bite → Boots of Dexterity → Axe of Torment → Bloodweeper → Master Sword → Shadow Ripper.
Run Mutation for stats that match Li Bai's Assassin kit. Take Smite — swap to Purify against heavy CC or Smite when jungling.
Standard trade: Stupor Slash → Stroke of Genius → Flickering Flurry → reposition. Weave basic attacks between skill casts for maximum damage and passive value.
Laning: Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.
Teamfight: Wait for CC from your team, then dive carry with full combo. Exit with reset or flash if focus fired.
Li Bai excels into Dun, Lian Po, Liu Shan. Avoid blind picking into Garo, Mozi, Shi without team peel.
Li Bai is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.0% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.

faqs.question: Is Li Bai good in the current meta?
faqs.answer: Li Bai is Tier A Assassin with 52.0% win rate, 0.7% pick rate, and 0.2% ban rate on Honor of Kings Global (Camp HOK, 2026-06-05). Solid situational pick.

faqs.question: What is the best Li Bai build?
faqs.answer: Core item path: Rapacious Bite, Boots of Dexterity, Axe of Torment, Bloodweeper, Master Sword, Shadow Ripper. Run Mutation arcana with Smite. Switch to alternate build presets on this page for jungle, clash, or late-game setups.

faqs.question: How to counter Li Bai?
faqs.answer: Pick Garo, Mozi, Shi into Li Bai. Deny Jungling resources early and force fights before Li Bai completes core items. Li Bai struggles when the enemy can peel and group them.

faqs.question: Who does Li Bai counter?
faqs.answer: Li Bai is strong into Dun, Lian Po, Liu Shan according to HoKStats matchup data and role matchups on the global server. Draft Li Bai when the enemy relies on these heroes in the Jungling lane.

faqs.question: Is Li Bai good in high rank / Diamond+?
faqs.answer: Li Bai is a viable Tier A pick in high rank with 52.0% win rate — strong in one-trick hands or as a counter-pick.

faqs.question: What lane should Li Bai play?
faqs.answer: Li Bai is tagged Jungling in Camp export (Assassin). Clear to level four, then gank the lane with the least escape. Secure Tyrant when your bot or mid has crash wave.

faqs.question: Best arcana and spells for Li Bai?
faqs.answer: Recommended: Mutation arcana. Battle spell: Smite. Adjust Purify/Execute based on enemy dive and jungle need.

faqs.question: Li Bai or Wukong — which is better?
faqs.answer: Li Bai vs Wukong (Assassin, Tier S): Wukong is 1.3% pick / 49.7% WR. Li Bai has +2.2% WR vs Wukong in Camp data. Choose Li Bai when you need Jungling identity; choose Wukong for Jungling comfort.

faqs.question: Should I ban Li Bai?
faqs.answer: Low priority ban (0.2%). Focus bans on higher-tier Assassin picks unless targeting a one-trick.
